title: The Comet And The Moon | Explanation In Hindi | Class 6
description:
Few people realize that Jayant Narlikar — one of India's most celebrated astrophysicists — wrote fiction specifically to make science feel urgent and alive, and "The Comet and the Moon" is exactly that experiment made into a Class 6 English lesson. The story quietly forces a question most students never expect from a textbook: what happens when human survival depends on a collision course with the cosmos? If you are studying this chapter for your Class 6 exams and want a clear, engaging explanation in Hindi covering themes of science, curiosity, and human courage, you are in exactly the right place.
